title: Aisle Seat
key_lyric: What if I can be your friend
one_line: A melancholic acoustic folk song features a male vocalist pondering uncertainty and the potential end of a relationship, accompanied by intricate fingerpicking guitar.

title: Another Thought
key_lyric: Now what am I to do
one_line: A reflective acoustic folk song contemplates past memories and an uncertain future with soft vocals and gentle strumming.

title: Dirt Poor Genius
key_lyric: I'm a dirt poor genius
one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic folk song about being an unappreciated "dirt poor genius" who struggles financially despite his talents, accompanied by ukulele and guitar.

title: Eendag
key_lyric: En dan eendag is dit alles verby
one_line: A male vocalist sings an acoustic folk song in Afrikaans, accompanied by a soft guitar melody, with a child occasionally speaking in the background.

title: Eendag (alt)
key_lyric: Ek weet eendag is dit alles verby
one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic Afrikaans folk song, accompanied by a softly strummed acoustic guitar, expressing reflection and hope amid challenges.

title: Eendag (demo)
key_lyric: Ek weet eendag is dit alles verby
one_line: A male vocalist with a gentle voice sings in Afrikaans over acoustic guitar, creating a calm and hopeful atmosphere.

title: Faith In the Human Race
key_lyric: Trying to constantly prove that you have faith in the human race
one_line: A contemplative acoustic folk track with a gentle male vocal reflecting on the complexities of faith in humanity.

title: For a While
key_lyric: Wondering about it all today
one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic folk-rock song with a prominent acoustic guitar and gentle percussion, exploring themes of time passing, uncertainty, and internal struggle.

title: God
key_lyric: God, my sweet Lord, I'm praying for a new beginning
one_line: A male vocalist sings a prayerful, longing song about a new beginning, accompanied by a single acoustic guitar playing melancholic chords.

title: Happiness That's Broke
key_lyric: So much sadness and all, so much happiness that's broke.
one_line: A somber male voice sings reflective lyrics over a gently fingerpicked acoustic guitar, exploring themes of sadness, broken happiness, and regret.

title: I woke up this morning
key_lyric: But I'll just keep on mourning the loss I never had
one_line: A tender male voice sings a melancholic folk ballad about finding solace in thought amidst an unidentifiable grief, accompanied by a gently fingerpicked acoustic guitar.

title: I'm Feeling Good
key_lyric: And it's all thanks to you
one_line: A tranquil acoustic folk song features a male vocalist reflecting on personal resilience and gratitude over gentle guitar strumming.

title: I'm Waiting
key_lyric: I'll stay here and think of you while I wait here forever just to be with you
one_line: A gentle acoustic guitar accompanies soft male vocals expressing deep longing and patient devotion for a beloved.

title: Just Fine
key_lyric: Leave me all alone
one_line: A melancholic alternative rock song featuring male vocals and a clean guitar melody, expressing themes of isolation and introspection with a gradual build in intensity.

title: Kry Kontrole
key_lyric: Eens gebore, nou verlore, nou bewoë
one_line: An introspective Afrikaans folk song featuring acoustic guitar and earnest male vocals, exploring themes of control, loss, and the journey of life.

title: Legacy
key_lyric: One day I'll be just like you
one_line: A gentle folk rock song with a male vocalist sings about hope and legacy, accompanied by acoustic guitar and subtle percussion.

title: Luister (demo)
key_lyric: Jy moet net luister
one_line: A calm, melancholic male voice sings in Afrikaans over a gentle acoustic guitar, offering a contemplative mood.

title: Mia's song from me
key_lyric: Yes, I know you've been struggling to know
one_line: A melancholic folk song features a male vocalist and gentle acoustic guitar, with the addition of a harmonica solo that enhances the wistful and somber mood.

title: One Day
key_lyric: One day, I'll be there waiting for you
one_line: A tender male vocal sings a melancholic yet hopeful folk tune about patiently waiting for a loved one, accompanied by acoustic guitar, bass, and accordion.

title: Realize
key_lyric: It's just a normal day, people going their own way
one_line: A reflective acoustic folk song featuring a melancholic male voice contemplating the silent anxieties and struggles hidden within ordinary life.

title: Reconnected
key_lyric: It seems to work slow, it seems to work fast time
one_line: A male vocalist delivers a melancholic acoustic folk narrative, reflecting on lost connections and the passage of time over intricate guitar melodies.

title: Scare off the devils
key_lyric: When you're ready, just come to me
one_line: A tender male voice sings an acoustic folk-rock song offering comfort and encouragement to someone facing life's challenges.

title: Singing Along
key_lyric: What else would I do if it weren't for you to pull me through
one_line: A male vocalist delivers a tender and reflective acoustic folk song, accompanied by simple, gentle guitar picking.

title: ten minutes he said
key_lyric: She gave him 10 minutes, he took 33, but she gave him a life and he gave her a dream.
one_line: A patient wife supports her coding husband's ambitious work, transforming his promised 'ten minutes' into a lifetime of shared dreams.

title: The Place
key_lyric: Memories and future thoughts are gone
one_line: A haunting acoustic folk song explores a mysterious, desolate place where past and future thoughts are lost to a melancholic solitude.

title: There's More to All of This (2025 Mix)
key_lyric: And the lights will shine when you won't die, but if you survive, fight the stormy weather.
one_line: A melancholic yet hopeful folk rock song with male vocals and a gradually building arrangement, encouraging resilience in the face of life's storms.

title: Too Much In My Mind
key_lyric: I am too much in my mind
one_line: A reflective male vocalist sings over a gently strummed acoustic guitar, exploring themes of overthinking and self-reflection in a melancholic indie folk style.

title: Wait until I feel good
key_lyric: Once there were some blues that I could not refuse
one_line: A melancholic male voice sings over a bluesy acoustic guitar, with a slide guitar adding a mournful counter-melody.

title: Alle mans (MIX 3)
key_lyric: omdat almal skelms is
one_line: This alternative rock track features a male vocalist singing in Afrikaans, conveying a sense of melancholy and introspection with a driving rhythm and a dark, reflective mood.

title: Bring vir my 6 gram
key_lyric: Makliker gesê as gedaan
one_line: Acoustic guitar strums accompany a male vocalist singing a mellow, introspective song in Afrikaans, with a reflective and slightly melancholic yet hopeful mood.

title: Drink tequila uit 'n skoen (DT1)
key_lyric: Drink tequila uit 'n skoen, dis presies wat jy moet doen
one_line: A male vocalist sings an energetic folk-rock song in Afrikaans, urging listeners to drink tequila from a shoe and rebel against the corporate world.

title: Ek is die een (pre-mastering)
key_lyric: Ek is een wat omgee, ek is een wat deurbreek
one_line: A determined alternative rock track in Afrikaans featuring driving guitars and vocals that express a commitment to caring and breaking through life's challenges.

title: Ek is die een 4
key_lyric: Ek is een wat omgee, ek is een wat deurbreek
one_line: This track features male vocals, electric guitars, bass, and drums in a driving rock style, with a slightly hopeful and determined mood.

title: Ek Is Die Een Wat Omgee
key_lyric: Ek gee dit als verniet weg
one_line: A driving rock song with male vocals in Afrikaans, featuring a powerful electric guitar riff and a determined, hopeful message about overcoming challenges and giving everything for free.

title: Freetown - Marlon Brando
key_lyric: You pull it too many times
one_line: A melancholic alternative rock song with a strong build-up and male vocals, featuring a slow, reflective intro that transitions into a more energized, emotional chorus with a powerful guitar solo.

title: Freetown - Must be a way
key_lyric: I know I deserve to dream my every freaking dream
one_line: This song features a driving alternative rock sound with angsty male vocals and a powerful chorus, emphasizing themes of resilience and the right to dream amidst challenging circumstances.

title: Freetown - Psychological Warfare
key_lyric: You say just an affair, I say love in despair, it was psychological warfare.
one_line: A driving alternative rock track with angsty male vocals expressing defiance and despair against manipulation, centered on a lingering, lost love.

title: howzit my bru
key_lyric: Dis baie lekker
one_line: An upbeat, reggae-infused track that playfully teaches listeners common Afrikaans words and phrases, explaining cultural nuances behind the language.

title: Laat dit rus (full arrangement)
key_lyric: Laat dit rus
one_line: A driving Afrikaans alternative rock track with a determined male vocal, proclaiming self-acceptance and defiance over a persistent drum and guitar rhythm.

title: Laat dit rus 1
key_lyric: Daar is niks wat my kan keer nie
one_line: A female vocalist sings passionately in Afrikaans over an acoustic guitar, asserting her strength and independence with a slightly rebellious edge.

title: Loneliness
key_lyric: What do you do when you get lonely, what do you do when you feel sad?
one_line: A melancholic male voice sings over a simple acoustic guitar and bass, posing questions about loneliness and sadness.

title: Nemesis
key_lyric: Why can't you see this through?
one_line: A raw and melancholic indie rock song features male vocals grappling with a persistent nemesis, pleading for resolution.

title: Ongemaklike Situasies
key_lyric: Ek het gedink ek sal vanish en ek het net gesê okay
one_line: This track features a driving alternative rock sound with a steady beat, layered with a male vocal in Afrikaans and a powerful electric guitar solo, creating a melancholy yet energetic atmosphere.

title: Opportunities and what happens to them
key_lyric: In some this opportunity is coming my way
one_line: A driving stoner rock track features heavily distorted guitars, a solid rhythm section, and melancholic English vocals reflecting on past hopes and future opportunities.

title: You see
key_lyric: It's sad to know this fall and know we have to fall
one_line: A melancholic male vocal sings with a sense of resignation over a brooding alternative rock arrangement featuring a clean electric guitar, bass, and drums.

title: Broken Ring Finger
one_line: A slow, spacious, and haunting acoustic guitar melody with a melancholic feel, gradually building in intensity and introducing other stringed instruments towards the end.

title: Jam
one_line: A late-night guitar conversation with no audience in mind.

title: Late night goodwill day beach vibes
one_line: A single acoustic guitar weaves a gentle, intricate melody with reflective and slightly somber undertones, occasionally incorporating percussive taps on the instrument.

title: Moving on up
one_line: This is a mellow and groovy jazz fusion track with a relaxed and jazzy feel, featuring a clean electric guitar melody and a solid rhythm section.

title: Recording on beach - late night early morning
one_line: A melancholic acoustic guitar plays a folk-like melody, creating a reflective and slightly somber atmosphere.

title: Sometimes
one_line: A dynamic instrumental track that begins with clean, atmospheric guitar arpeggios before building into a powerful, distorted progressive metal soundscape.

title: That's How I Wanna Go
key_lyric: That's how I wanna go
one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic blues tune about dying dreams and how he wants to go, accompanied by a clean electric guitar with heavy tremolo and some harmonica.

title: The Black Sheep
one_line: A high-energy, distorted rock track with a bluesy and playful feel, featuring a dominant electric guitar with whammy bar effects, backed by a driving drum beat and bass.

title: the river must flow
one_line: A peaceful and reflective classical guitar piece featuring a gentle arpeggiated melody.

title: Tigrrr's Song
one_line: A mellow acoustic guitar solo featuring bluesy licks and jazz-infused melodies with a reflective feel.

title: Track 149
one_line: A smooth and laid-back saxophone solo with a gentle, relaxing melody suitable for a lounge or chill-out setting.

title: Wave to Frank
one_line: A melancholic electric guitar melody builds dynamically with rock drum beats and a pulsing bassline into an expressive, slightly bluesy rock instrumental.

title: Fuck Everything
one_line: A cacophony of distorted electronic sounds, reminiscent of a malfunctioning robot orchestra, creates a chaotic and unsettling sonic landscape with an industrial edge.

title: it's gonna go dark
one_line: A gentle acoustic guitar melody creates a relaxed and reflective atmosphere, with occasional ambient sounds of wind, forming a mellow instrumental folk piece.

title: It's time
one_line: A sinister and drawn-out drone with occasional high-pitched swells creates a truly unsettling atmosphere perfect for horror or suspense.

title: Moeg vir jou kak
one_line: A fingerpicked acoustic guitar plays a melancholic and thoughtful tune, evoking a reflective mood.

title: The Mood Stabilizing Depressant Circus
one_line: This track features chaotic, high-energy metal music with a dark and aggressive mood, characterized by fast-paced riffs, shredding solos, and a powerful drum beat, creating an intense and unsettling atmosphere.

title: Trip to the Circus
one_line: This track features experimental electronic noise with a harsh, high-pitched, and distorted soundscape, building in intensity and creating an unsettling, industrial atmosphere.

title: vervreem
key_lyric: Ons verneem dat ons vrees die waarheid is
one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic folk song in Afrikaans, accompanied by a single acoustic guitar, creating a somber yet heartfelt atmosphere.

title: Golden Hair
key_lyric: Lean out your window, golden hair
one_line: A gentle male voice sings a melancholic folk ballad, accompanied by sparse acoustic guitar picking.

title: If (Pink Floyd Cover)
key_lyric: If I were a good man, I'd talk to you more often than I can.
one_line: A melancholic male voice reflects on regrets and possibilities, accompanied by tenderly plucked acoustic guitar.

title: If You Go Away
key_lyric: If you go away on this summer day, then you might as well take the sun away.
one_line: A somber folk song features a male vocalist and acoustic guitar, reflecting on the profound sadness of a loved one leaving, comparing their departure to the absence of the sun and the end of cherished memories.

title: You've got to hide your love away

title: Aisle Seat Mix 1
key_lyric: I don't know that I can know

title: Mix 1.2

title: Mix Final 1.1
key_lyric: Fight the stormy weather
one_line: A dynamic folk-rock track that journeys from melancholic reflection through ambient introspection to a powerful, defiant climax against life's storms.

title: Mixdown

title: Mixdown 1 - TMTAOT

title: Realise 1

one_line: A melancholic alternative rock song with a male vocalist contemplating the struggles of everyday life and yearning for realization.
